features: FAST-ACTING DEGREASER: This washing up spray blasts through stubborn grease in seconds. It makes light work of dirty pots and pans, perfect for quick clean-ups after family meals or Sunday roasts.

CONVENIENT SPRAY BOTTLE: No more waste or spills – the 500ml spray design gives just the right amount of dish soap. Simply spray onto dishes, glasses or sinks, then rinse for a spotless finish every time.
ZESTY SCENT CHOICES: Choose from Lemon, Pink Grapefruit, Gingerbread or Apple & Cinnamon. Whether it's summer freshness or cosy winter vibes, these scents make cleaning feel like less of a chore.
GENTLE ON HANDS: Designed to cut grease without being harsh, this spray keeps hands feeling soft even after tackling a full washing up bowl. Great for daily use in busy family kitchens.
MULTI-SURFACE USE: Not just for dishes – these cleaning products are brilliant on hobs, sinks and worktops too. Perfect for quick wipe-downs in the kitchen or around the home.
EASY ON, EASY OFF: The spray nozzle twists to lock securely when not in use. It's safe to store under sinks or by the washing up bowl, with no leaks or drips.
PERFECT FOR GLASSES: This dish soap rinses off easily without leaving streaks. Whether cleaning wine glasses after a dinner party or kids’ cups at lunchtime, it leaves everything gleaming.
FRESHENS AS IT CLEANS: With long-lasting fragrance in every spray, it refreshes the sink area while tackling mess. A quick spritz leaves the kitchen smelling fresh and clean.
POWERFUL YET SIMPLE: Spray, wipe and rinse – it's that easy. No need to scrub or soak for ages. Whether cleaning after cooking or tidying up before guests arrive, it saves time and effort.
SEASONAL LIMITED EDITIONS: Enjoy special scents like Gingerbread and Apple & Cinnamon during autumn and winter. They bring warmth and cheer to the kitchen, especially during festive seasons.
description: Product Description Bring joy back to the sink with Elbow Grease Washing Up Liquid Spray – the powerful, no-fuss way to tackle everyday washing up. Designed to cut through grease and grime in seconds, this hardworking dish soap comes in a convenient spray format for quick, targeted application. Whether scrubbing burnt pans, wiping kitchen surfaces or rinsing delicate glasses, these cleaning products are made to handle the mess with ease. With a choice of uplifting scents – including zingy Lemon, fruity Pink Grapefruit, or limited-edition seasonal favourites like Gingerbread and Apple & Cinnamon – washing up has never smelled so good. The 500ml bottle features a handy On/Off trigger for mess-free use, while the fast-acting formula leaves dishes sparkling and surfaces fresh. Ideal for everyday cleaning around the home, this spray brings the trusted power of Elbow Grease straight to your washing up bowl. Ingredients 5 – 15% Anionic Surfactants, <5% Non-Ionic Surfactants, Disodium EDTA, Perfume, Limonene, 5-chloro-2-methyl-1,2-thiazol-3(2H)-one, 2-methyl-1,2-thiazol-3(2H)-one. Directions Turn the spray nozzle to the 'On' position. Simply spray, wipe and rinse. For heavy soiling, leave for a few minutes before wiping and rinsing. After use turn nozzle to 'Off' position. Manufacturer Contact Information Elbow Grease Lemon Trigger Spray Washing Up Liquid 500ml See more
